meta.title: Remaining Fixes — Safety Pharmacology Training Dataset

issues.score_impact_achieved: D3: 50 → 100 (3 rules elevated from PARTIALLY_VERIFIED to VERIFIED)
issues.description: ADC, oligonucleotides, and peptides safety pharmacology modality rules — verified by reading finalized ICH E14/S7B Q&As in full (FDA Aug 2022 + EMA Mar 2022 adoptions).
issues.resolution: Read FDA_E14_S7B_QAs_Guidance.pdf (pages 1–46, Q1–Q30 complete) and EMA_E14_S7B_QAs_Step5.pdf (pages 1–25). No ADC-specific, oligonucleotide-specific, or peptide-specific guidance found in any Q&A. Q15/6.3 is the only modality Q&A — covers large targeted proteins and mAbs only. Verified finding: no special rules exist for these modalities in finalized Q&As; general ICH S7A/S7B principles apply.

issues.score_impact_achieved: D4: 75 → 100 (1 rule elevated from UNRESOLVED to VERIFIED)
issues.description: Safety pharmacology regional differences — verified by reading FDA S7A guidance in full.
issues.resolution: Read FDA_S7A_Safety_Pharmacology_Guidance.pdf (pages 1–13, complete). FDA guidance is ICH S7A text adopted verbatim. No FDA-specific additions, requirements, footnotes, or deviations from harmonized ICH text. Jan 2025 Update is administrative only. ICH harmonization confirmed complete — no regional divergence between US/EU/Japan for safety pharmacology requirements.

issues.score_impact_achieved: D1: 78 → 80 (3 rules elevated from PARTIALLY_VERIFIED to VERIFIED)
issues.description: Several Phase III and marketing approval timing rules remained PARTIALLY_VERIFIED. Re-read M3(R2) doc pages 17-20 and extracted direct verbatim quotes for each sub-rule.

what_was_resolved_this_session.fix_001_modality_qa_reading: RESOLVED — FDA and EMA E14/S7B Q&As read in full (Q1–Q30). No ADC/oligo/peptide content confirmed. 3 modality rules VERIFIED. D3: 50 → 100.
what_was_resolved_this_session.fix_002_fda_s7a_reading: RESOLVED — FDA S7A guidance read in full (pages 1–13). ICH S7A verbatim adoption confirmed. No regional divergence. Regional differences rule VERIFIED. D4: 75 → 100.
what_was_resolved_this_session.fix_003_m3r2_timing_quotes: RESOLVED — M3(R2) doc pages 17-20 re-read; 3 timing rules upgraded PARTIALLY_VERIFIED → VERIFIED; D1: 78 → 80.

what_is_already_resolved.gap_3_regional_differences: CLOSED — 4/4 regional items verified (FIX-002 resolved safety pharm specific)
what_is_already_resolved.gap_4_proarrhythmia: CLOSED — 6/6 criteria (criteria 3 and 5 were missing, now added)
what_is_already_resolved.ctd_placement_module: VERIFIED — Module 4.2.1.3 confirmed from M4S(R2) page 12
what_is_already_resolved.s9_anticancer_integration: VERIFIED — Section 2.2 confirmed, endpoints in general tox not standalone
what_is_already_resolved.gene_therapy_safety_pharm: VERIFIED — FDA CGT guidance confirms no standalone section; embedded in tox
what_is_already_resolved.vaccine_safety_pharm: VERIFIED — WHO TRS 927 Annex 1 confirms no standalone section; Section 4 toxicity framework

composite_final.d1_remaining_gap: D1 at 80 — 26 minor rules PARTIALLY_VERIFIED. No external document blocks. Effort-based gap only: re-reading source PDFs to extract verbatim quotes for out_of_scope clause, CNS abuse liability, well-characterized PK/PD exception, combination drugs, J-Tpeakc, 20 bpm HR threshold, and ~20 additional minor items.
composite_final.note: All 3 fixes resolved. D3 and D4 now at 100. The only remaining below-100 dimension is D1 at 80, which requires source re-reading effort but no new external documents.
